Quality Education.reason: Focus on 'social theory' and 'theoretical perspectives' supports Target 4.7 on education for sustainable development.
evidence: 社會學理論的歷史背景
社會學的基本問題與學科特性

No Poverty.reason: The course analyzes 'industrial capitalism (工業資本主義)' and Bourdieu's 'capital theory (資本說)', providing a theoretical framework for understanding the structural roots of poverty and inequality (Target 1.2).
evidence: 工業資本主義
淺談布迪厄（1930-2002）的資本說

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course covers Freud's psychoanalysis, including '變態的本能' (perverse instincts), which provides a theoretical basis for understanding aspects of mental health, a component of Target 3.4.
evidence: 佛洛伊德（1856-1939）：從愛慾到死慾
佛洛伊德與生理學：變態的本能

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to cultivate critical thinking and discourse abilities ('培養同學們自主進行理論思維的組織與論述能力').
evidence: 科目名稱：社會學理論
培養同學們自主進行理論思維的組織與論述能力

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course analyzes 'industrial capitalism (工業資本主義)' and 'technological capitalism (科技資本主義)', which are foundational concepts for understanding modern economic structures, though not decent work specifically.
evidence: 工業資本主義
科技資本主義

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course critically examines social structures producing inequality, including 'power mechanisms (規訓與模控)', 'globalization (全球化)', and Bourdieu's capital theory, directly addressing Target 10.2 and 10.3.
evidence: 身心化的權力機制（規訓與模控）
全球化的液態現代
淺談布迪厄（1930-2002）的資本說

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course analyzes how contemporary society is rebuilt on 'consumption... forms (消費...形式)' and includes required reading on 'The Consumer Society,' directly addressing consumption patterns (Target 12.1, 12.8).
evidence: 當代社會重構在消費和溝通形式中
衝動化的資本邏輯（消費和金融）
Baudrillard, Jean (1998/1970) ... The Consumer Society

Climate Action.reason: A brief mention of social theorists foreseeing future 'natural disaster (自然災難)' provides a minimal, inferred link to resilience against climate-related hazards (Target 13.1).
evidence: 文化危機和自然災難的未來趨勢

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course analyzes Foucault's work on 'power mechanisms (規訓與模控)' and 'Discipline and Punish,' providing a critical examination of institutional power and control, relevant to Target 16.6.
evidence: 傅柯（1926-1984）：從知識到權力
身心化的權力機制（規訓與模控）
Foucault, Michel (1995/1975) “Panopticism”... in Discipline and Punish
